import json, re, csv, collections, statistics, os
import pandas as pd

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
#  FILE PATHS — adapter si besoin
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
FILES = {
    'Biostars'         : {'path': 'biostars_db.csv',                'format': 'csv'},
    'Papers'           : {'path': 'metagenomics_instruction.jsonl', 'format': 'jsonl'},
    'QIIME2'           : {'path': 'qiime2_filtred.jsonl',           'format': 'jsonl'},
    'Biostackexchange' : {'path': 'biostackexchange_filtred.jsonl', 'format': 'jsonl'},
    'Bioconductor'     : {'path': 'bioconductor_filtred.jsonl',     'format': 'jsonl'},
}
print('Config OK')

print(f'\n{"─"*50}')
print(f'  PROPORTION PAR DATASOURCE')
print(f'{"─"*50}')
print(f'  {"Source":<20} {"Records":>8}  {"Share":>7}')
print(f'  {"─"*40}')
for name, recs in LOADED.items():
    pct = len(recs) / total_raw * 100 if total_raw else 0
    bar = '█' * int(pct / 2)
    print(f'  {name:<20} {len(recs):>8,}  {pct:>6.1f}%  {bar}')
print(f'  {"─"*40}')
print(f'  {"TOTAL":<20} {total_raw:>8,}  {100:>6.1f}%')

source:
bs = LOADED.get('Biostars', [])
if not bs:
    print('Biostars non chargé')
else:
    df_bs = pd.DataFrame(bs)

    # ── Basic structure ──
    print(f'Colonnes : {list(df_bs.columns)}')
    print(f'Total    : {len(df_bs):,} records')

    # ── Accepted / Score ──
    if 'accepted' in df_bs.columns:
        acc = df_bs['accepted'].sum() if df_bs['accepted'].dtype == bool else (df_bs['accepted'] == True).sum()
        print(f'Accepted answers        : {acc:,} ({acc/len(df_bs)*100:.1f}%)')
    if 'score' in df_bs.columns:
        print(f'Score moyen             : {df_bs["score"].mean():.1f}')
        print(f'Score >= 2              : {(df_bs["score"] >= 2).sum():,} ({(df_bs["score"] >= 2).mean()*100:.1f}%)')

    # ── Tags → catégories ──
    CATEGORIES_BS = {
        'Assembly':              ['assembly','assemble','spades','megahit','contig','scaffold'],
        'Binning':               ['bin','metabat','maxbin','checkm','binning'],
        'QC / Preprocessing':   ['fastqc','trimmomatic','fastp','quality','adapter','trim'],
        'Taxonomy/Classif':     ['classif','taxonom','kraken','metaphlan','bracken','16s','otu','asv'],
        'Alignment / Mapping':  ['bowtie','bwa','mapping','align','bam','sam','minimap'],
        'Database / SRA':       ['database','ncbi','sra','download','genbank'],
        'Annotation':           ['annot','prokka','prodigal','gene','kegg','cog'],
        'Visualization':        ['visual','plot','ggplot','qiime','diversity','alpha','beta'],
        'Troubleshooting':      ['error','fail','bug','issue','problem','fix','not work'],
        'Environment/Install':  ['conda','mamba','install','docker','singularity','bioconda'],
        'Statistics / ML':      ['statistic','machine learning','pca','umap','differential'],
    }

    def detect_cats_bs(row):
        q = str(row.get('question',''))
        a = str(row.get('answer',''))
        t = str(row.get('tags',''))
        text = (q + ' ' + a + ' ' + t).lower()
        found = [cat for cat, kws in CATEGORIES_BS.items() if any(k in text for k in kws)]
        return found if found else ['Uncategorized']

    df_bs['categories'] = df_bs.apply(detect_cats_bs, axis=1)
    cat_flat = [c for cats in df_bs['categories'] for c in cats]
    cat_counts = collections.Counter(cat_flat)

    print(f'\n{"─"*50}')
    print(f'  BIOSTARS — DISTRIBUTION PAR CATÉGORIE (multi-label)')
    print(f'{"─"*50}')
    for cat, cnt in sorted(cat_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
        pct = cnt / len(df_bs) * 100
        print(f'  {cat:<28} {cnt:>5,}  ({pct:5.1f}%)')

    # ── Hors-sujet ──
    METAGENOMIC_KW = [
        'metagenom','microbiome','microbiota','shotgun','assembly','contig','binning',
        'metabat','maxbin','checkm','metaspades','megahit','kraken','metaphlan',
        'dna','genome','sequencing','fastq','fasta','reads','illumina','nanopore',
        'taxonomy','16s','amplicon','otu','asv','phylogenetic','bacteria','archaea',
        'fastqc','trimmomatic','fastp','bowtie','bwa','samtools','prokka','prodigal'
    ]
    NON_META_KW = ['rna-seq','rnaseq','transcriptom','mrna','expression','deseq',
                   'edger','kallisto','chip-seq','atac-seq','gwas','somatic','snp calling']

    def is_meta_bs(row):
        text = (str(row.get('question','')) + ' ' + str(row.get('answer','')) + ' ' + str(row.get('tags',''))).lower()
        return any(k in text for k in METAGENOMIC_KW) and not any(k in text for k in NON_META_KW)

    df_bs['is_meta'] = df_bs.apply(is_meta_bs, axis=1)
    n_meta    = df_bs['is_meta'].sum()
    n_offopic = len(df_bs) - n_meta

    print(f'\n{"─"*50}')
    print(f'  BIOSTARS — HORS-SUJET')
    print(f'{"─"*50}')
    print(f'  Métagénomique pertinent : {n_meta:>6,}  ({n_meta/len(df_bs)*100:.1f}%)')
    print(f'  Hors-sujet (RNA-seq…)   : {n_offopic:>6,}  ({n_offopic/len(df_bs)*100:.1f}%)')

    # ── Top hors-sujet tags ──
    hs_df = df_bs[~df_bs['is_meta']]
    if len(hs_df) > 0 and 'tags' in hs_df.columns:
        all_hs_tags = []
        for t in hs_df['tags']:
            parts = re.split(r'[,;]', str(t))
            all_hs_tags.extend([p.strip().lower() for p in parts if p.strip()])
        top_hs = collections.Counter(all_hs_tags).most_common(10)
        print(f'  Top tags hors-sujet     : {", ".join(t for t,_ in top_hs)}')

source:
papers = LOADED.get('Papers', [])
if not papers:
    print('Papers non chargé')
else:
    print(f'Total records : {len(papers):,}')
    print(f'Champs        : {list(papers[0].keys()) if papers else "N/A"}')

    TOPICS_PAPERS = {
        'Gut Microbiota':          ['microbiota','microbiome','microbial','gut bacteria'],
        'Metabolites / SCFA':      ['metabolite','short-chain','fatty acid','scfa','butyrate','propionate'],
        'Immunology':              ['immune','cytokine','inflammatory','macrophage','t cell'],
        'Receptor Signaling':      ['receptor','signaling','gpr41','gpr43','cascade','pathway','kinase'],
        'Gut Barrier / Mucosal':   ['barrier','mucosal','epithelial','tight junction','permeability'],
        'Diet / Nutrition':        ['diet','nutrition','fiber','substrate','polyphenol','carbohydrate'],
        'Poultry Biology':         ['poultry','avian','chicken','broiler','turkey','hen'],
        'Fermentation':            ['ferment','anaerobic','lactic acid','bifidobacterium','lactobacillus'],
        'Metagenomics Tools':      ['metaspades','fastqc','checkm','maxbin','trimmomatic','fastp','bowtie','kraken','assembly','binning'],
        'Epigenetics':             ['epigenetic','histone','deacetylase','methylation','chromatin'],
        'Energy / Metabolism':     ['glycolysis','atp','energy','mitochondria','metabolic pathway','lipid'],
        'Taxonomy / Classif':      ['taxonomy','16s','phylogenetic','species','genus','otu','asv'],
    }

    # Topics considérés hors-scope pour MetaGenomic Assistant
    TOPICS_OFF = {'Poultry Biology', 'Receptor Signaling', 'Gut Barrier / Mucosal',
                  'Immunology', 'Diet / Nutrition'}

    topic_counters = collections.Counter()
    off_topic_count = 0

    for r in papers:
        text = (r.get('instruction','') + ' ' + r.get('output','')).lower()
        found = [t for t, kws in TOPICS_PAPERS.items() if any(k in text for k in kws)]
        if not found:
            found = ['Uncategorized']
        for t in found:
            topic_counters[t] += 1
        if all(t in TOPICS_OFF or t == 'Uncategorized' for t in found):
            off_topic_count += 1

    print(f'\n{"─"*52}')
    print(f'  PAPERS — DISTRIBUTION PAR TOPIC (multi-label)')
    print(f'{"─"*52}')
    for topic, cnt in sorted(topic_counters.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
        pct = cnt / len(papers) * 100
        flag = ' ← hors-scope' if topic in TOPICS_OFF else ''
        print(f'  {topic:<30} {cnt:>5,}  ({pct:5.1f}%){flag}')

    print(f'\n{"─"*52}')
    print(f'  PAPERS — HORS-SUJET (topics non pertinents pour l\'agent)')
    print(f'{"─"*52}')
    off_in_scope = len(papers) - off_topic_count
    print(f'  Pertinent (au moins 1 topic utile) : {off_in_scope:>6,}  ({off_in_scope/len(papers)*100:.1f}%)')
    print(f'  Hors-sujet (Poultry, Immunology…)  : {off_topic_count:>6,}  ({off_topic_count/len(papers)*100:.1f}%)')
    print(f'  Topics hors-scope                  : {", ".join(TOPICS_OFF)}')

qiime = LOADED.get('QIIME2', [])
if not qiime:
    print('QIIME2 non chargé')
else:
    def get_category(r):
        if 'category' in r: return r['category']
        return r.get('metadata', {}).get('category', 'unknown')

    cat_counts = collections.Counter(get_category(r) for r in qiime)

    print(f'Total records : {len(qiime):,}')
    print(f'\n{"─"*52}')
    print(f'  QIIME2 — DISTRIBUTION PAR CATÉGORIE')
    print(f'{"─"*52}')
    for cat, cnt in sorted(cat_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
        pct = cnt / len(qiime) * 100
        print(f'  {cat:<38} {cnt:>5,}  ({pct:5.1f}%)')

    KEEP_Q = [
        'qiime','qiime2','amplicon','16s','18s','its','otu','asv','dada2','deblur',
        'taxonomy','silva','greengenes','rdp','classifier','microbiome','microbiota',
        'diversity','alpha','beta','unifrac','bray','phylogenetic','rarefaction',
        'demultiplex','primer','cutadapt','fastq','feature-table','biom','metadata'
    ]
    REMOVE_Q = [
        'rna-seq','rnaseq','transcriptom','mrna','expression level',
        'chip-seq','atac-seq','gwas','somatic','single cell','scrna',
        'proteomics','metabolomics'
    ]

    def relevant_q(r):
        text = (r.get('instruction','') + ' ' + r.get('input','') + ' ' + r.get('output','')).lower()
        return any(k in text for k in KEEP_Q) and not any(k in text for k in REMOVE_Q)

    n_rel = sum(1 for r in qiime if relevant_q(r))
    n_off = len(qiime) - n_rel

    print(f'\n{"─"*52}')
    print(f'  QIIME2 — HORS-SUJET')
    print(f'{"─"*52}')
    print(f'  Pertinent (QIIME2/amplicon/micro) : {n_rel:>6,}  ({n_rel/len(qiime)*100:.1f}%)')
    print(f'  Hors-sujet (RNA-seq, proteomics…) : {n_off:>6,}  ({n_off/len(qiime)*100:.1f}%)')

    # Longueurs
    out_lens = [len(r.get('output','').split()) for r in qiime]
    print(f'\n  Longueur output — moy: {statistics.mean(out_lens):.0f}w  méd: {statistics.median(out_lens):.0f}w  min: {min(out_lens)}  max: {max(out_lens)}')

bse = LOADED.get('Biostackexchange', [])
if not bse:
    print('Biostackexchange non chargé')
else:
    def get_category(r):
        if 'category' in r: return r['category']
        return r.get('metadata', {}).get('category', 'unknown')

    cat_counts = collections.Counter(get_category(r) for r in bse)

    print(f'Total records : {len(bse):,}')
    print(f'\n{"─"*52}')
    print(f'  BIOSTACKEXCHANGE — DISTRIBUTION PAR CATÉGORIE')
    print(f'{"─"*52}')
    for cat, cnt in sorted(cat_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
        pct = cnt / len(bse) * 100
        print(f'  {cat:<38} {cnt:>5,}  ({pct:5.1f}%)')

    KEEP_BSE = [
        'metagenom','microbiome','microbiota','16s','amplicon','otu','asv',
        'assembly','contig','binning','metabat','maxbin','checkm','metaspades',
        'megahit','kraken','metaphlan','bracken','taxonomy','phylogenetic',
        'bacteria','archaea','fastq','fasta','reads','sequencing','illumina',
        'genome','alignment','annotation','prokka','fastqc','trimmomatic',
        'fastp','bowtie','samtools','diversity','shotgun','scaffold','coverage'
    ]
    REMOVE_BSE = [
        'rna-seq','rnaseq','transcriptom','mrna','expression level',
        'chip-seq','atac-seq','gwas','somatic','single cell','scrna',
        'protein structure','proteomics','metabolomics'
    ]

    def relevant_bse(r):
        text = (r.get('instruction','') + ' ' + r.get('input','') + ' ' + r.get('output','')).lower()
        return any(k in text for k in KEEP_BSE) and not any(k in text for k in REMOVE_BSE)

    n_rel = sum(1 for r in bse if relevant_bse(r))
    n_off = len(bse) - n_rel

    print(f'\n{"─"*52}')
    print(f'  BIOSTACKEXCHANGE — HORS-SUJET')
    print(f'{"─"*52}')
    print(f'  Pertinent (métagénomique)         : {n_rel:>6,}  ({n_rel/len(bse)*100:.1f}%)')
    print(f'  Hors-sujet (RNA-seq, proteomics…) : {n_off:>6,}  ({n_off/len(bse)*100:.1f}%)')

    out_lens = [len(r.get('output','').split()) for r in bse]
    print(f'\n  Longueur output — moy: {statistics.mean(out_lens):.0f}w  méd: {statistics.median(out_lens):.0f}w  min: {min(out_lens)}  max: {max(out_lens)}')

bio = LOADED.get('Bioconductor', [])
if not bio:
    print('Bioconductor non chargé')
else:
    def get_category(r):
        if 'category' in r: return r['category']
        return r.get('metadata', {}).get('category', 'unknown')

    cat_counts = collections.Counter(get_category(r) for r in bio)

    print(f'Total records : {len(bio):,}')
    print(f'\n{"─"*52}')
    print(f'  BIOCONDUCTOR — DISTRIBUTION PAR CATÉGORIE')
    print(f'{"─"*52}')
    for cat, cnt in sorted(cat_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
        pct = cnt / len(bio) * 100
        print(f'  {cat:<38} {cnt:>5,}  ({pct:5.1f}%)')

    KEEP_BIO = [
        'metagenom','microbiome','microbiota','16s','amplicon','otu','asv',
        'assembly','contig','binning','metabat','maxbin','checkm','metaspades',
        'kraken','metaphlan','bracken','taxonomy','phylogenetic','bacteria',
        'archaea','fastq','fasta','reads','sequencing','illumina','genome',
        'alignment','annotation','prokka','fastqc','trimmomatic','fastp',
        'bowtie','samtools','diversity','shotgun','whole genome','scaffold'
    ]
    REMOVE_BIO = [
        'rna-seq','rnaseq','transcriptom','mrna','expression level',
        'chip-seq','atac-seq','gwas','somatic','single cell','scrna',
        'protein structure','proteomics','metabolomics'
    ]

    def relevant_bio(r):
        text = (r.get('instruction','') + ' ' + r.get('input','') + ' ' + r.get('output','')).lower()
        return any(k in text for k in KEEP_BIO) and not any(k in text for k in REMOVE_BIO)

    n_rel = sum(1 for r in bio if relevant_bio(r))
    n_off = len(bio) - n_rel

    print(f'\n{"─"*52}')
    print(f'  BIOCONDUCTOR — HORS-SUJET')
    print(f'{"─"*52}')
    print(f'  Pertinent (métagénomique)         : {n_rel:>6,}  ({n_rel/len(bio)*100:.1f}%)')
    print(f'  Hors-sujet (RNA-seq, proteomics…) : {n_off:>6,}  ({n_off/len(bio)*100:.1f}%)')

    out_lens = [len(r.get('output','').split()) for r in bio]
    print(f'\n  Longueur output — moy: {statistics.mean(out_lens):.0f}w  méd: {statistics.median(out_lens):.0f}w  min: {min(out_lens)}  max: {max(out_lens)}')

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def relevance_generic(recs, keep_kw, remove_kw, text_fn):
    n_rel = sum(1 for r in recs
                if any(k in text_fn(r) for k in keep_kw)
                and not any(k in text_fn(r) for k in remove_kw))
    return n_rel, len(recs) - n_rel

META_KW = [
    'metagenom','microbiome','microbiota','16s','amplicon','otu','asv','shotgun',
    'assembly','contig','binning','metabat','maxbin','checkm','metaspades','megahit',
    'kraken','metaphlan','taxonomy','phylogenetic','bacteria','archaea','dada2',
    'fastq','fasta','sequencing','illumina','genome','fastqc','trimmomatic','fastp',
    'bowtie','samtools','prokka','diversity','scaffold','qiime','silva','greengenes'
]
NON_META = [
    'rna-seq','rnaseq','transcriptom','mrna','chip-seq','atac-seq','gwas',
    'somatic','single cell','scrna','proteomics'
]

def text_jsonl(r):
    return (r.get('instruction','') + ' ' + r.get('input','') + ' ' + r.get('output','')).lower()

def text_bs(r):
    return (str(r.get('question','')) + ' ' + str(r.get('answer','')) + ' ' + str(r.get('tags',''))).lower()

summary = {}
for name, recs, fn in [
    ('Biostars',         LOADED.get('Biostars',[]),         text_bs),
    ('Papers',           LOADED.get('Papers',[]),           text_jsonl),
    ('QIIME2',           LOADED.get('QIIME2',[]),           text_jsonl),
    ('Biostackexchange', LOADED.get('Biostackexchange',[]), text_jsonl),
    ('Bioconductor',     LOADED.get('Bioconductor',[]),     text_jsonl),
]:
    n_rel, n_off = relevance_generic(recs, META_KW, NON_META, fn)
    summary[name] = {'total': len(recs), 'relevant': n_rel, 'off_topic': n_off}

total_all = sum(v['total']    for v in summary.values())
total_rel = sum(v['relevant'] for v in summary.values())
total_off = sum(v['off_topic'] for v in summary.values())

# --- AFFICHAGE TEXTE ORIGINAL ---
print('═'*70)
print('   METAGENOMICASSISTANT — SYNTHÈSE GLOBALE (RAW DATASETS)')
print('═'*70)
print(f'  {"Source":<20} {"Total":>8}  {"Share":>6}  {"Pertinent":>10}  {"Hors-sujet":>10}')
print(f'  {"─"*65}')
for name, v in summary.items():
    pct_src = v['total'] / total_all * 100 if total_all else 0
    pct_rel = v['relevant'] / v['total'] * 100 if v['total'] else 0
    pct_off = v['off_topic'] / v['total'] * 100 if v['total'] else 0
    print(f'  {name:<20} {v["total"]:>8,}  {pct_src:>5.1f}%  {v["relevant"]:>6,} ({pct_rel:4.0f}%)  {v["off_topic"]:>6,} ({pct_off:4.0f}%)')
print(f'  {"─"*65}')
print(f'  {"TOTAL":<20} {total_all:>8,}  {100:>5.1f}%  {total_rel:>6,} ({total_rel/total_all*100:4.0f}%)  {total_off:>6,} ({total_off/total_all*100:4.0f}%)')
print('═'*70)

# --- GRAPHIQUE VISUEL ---
labels = list(summary.keys())
rel_counts = [v['relevant'] for v in summary.values()]
off_counts = [v['off_topic'] for v in summary.values()]
totals = [v['total'] for v in summary.values()]

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(11, 6))

# Création des barres empilées (Binaire : Vert / Rouge)
b1 = ax.bar(labels, rel_counts, label='Pertinent (Metagenomics)', color='#4ade80', edgecolor='white')
b2 = ax.bar(labels, off_counts, bottom=rel_counts, label='Hors-sujet', color='#f87171', edgecolor='white')

ax.set_ylabel('Nombre de requêtes / records', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_title('Pertinence des données brutes par source', fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', pad=20)
ax.grid(axis='y', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)

# Placer la légende
ax.legend(loc='upper right', bbox_to_anchor=(1, 1.1), fontsize=10, shadow=True, fancybox=True)


for i, (r, o, t) in enumerate(zip(rel_counts, off_counts, totals)):
    if t > 0:
        ax.text(i, t + (max(totals)*0.015), f"{t}", ha='center', va='bottom', fontweight='bold', fontsize=12)
        pct_rel = (r / t) * 100
        if pct_rel > 3: 
            ax.text(i, r / 2, f"{pct_rel:.0f}%", ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold', fontsize=10, color='#1e293b')
        pct_off = (o / t) * 100
        if pct_off > 3: 
            ax.text(i, r + (o / 2), f"{pct_off:.0f}%", ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold', fontsize=10, color='#1e293b')
explication = (
    "Raisons du 'Hors-Sujet' (Rouge) :\n"
    "--------------------------------------\n"
    "1. Hors Contexte : Le texte ne contient\n"
    "   aucun mot-clé cible (16s, shotgun...)\n\n"
    "2. Autre Domaine : Le texte aborde d'autres\n"
    "   sujets (RNA-seq, GWAS, proteomics...)"
)
props = dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#1e293b', alpha=0.9, edgecolor='gray')
ax.text(1.05, 0.5, explication, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=11,
        verticalalignment='center', bbox=props, color='white', fontweight='bold')

plt.xticks(rotation=30, ha='right', fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.subplots_adjust(right=1)
plt.show()
